perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black puff-sleeve top, stands in a warehouse aisle holding a large 4-pack set of plush pet toys. (2) The camera transitions between shots of her holding the product and close-up views of the product's packaging and the store's price tag. (3) She points to the text on the packaging and touches the individual plush toys, which include a seahorse, a whale, and a shark. (4) The video concludes with her holding the full product pack toward the camera, emphasizing its size and the characters included.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo instrumental background music with a light pop feel starts. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, energetic, and enthusiastic tone in Mandarin. (2) Faint ambient warehouse noise is audible in the background. (3) A distinct 'ding' or 'squeak' sound effect is used to emphasize key points in the narration. (4) The vocals maintain a consistent volume and speed, concluding with a cheerful inflection.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid at the top of the frame throughout the video. (2) Hook Text: '這個沒有特別的嗎？' (Is there anything special about this?) followed by '特別可愛啊' (Specially cute) in yellow and white bubbles. (3) Functional Text: '$629' appearing on the shelf tag. (4) Decorative Text: '超便宜' (Super cheap) and '回收保特瓶做的' (Made from recycled plastic bottles) to emphasize product value. (5) Hook Text: '超可愛漂浮玩具' (Super cute floating toy) appearing in a large colorful graphic.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Detail Zoom -> Value Proposition -> Closing Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator interacting with the product
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long dark hair wearing a black puff-sleeve top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: High-stacked warehouse shelves filled with bulk products and cardboard boxes typical of a Costco environment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Value Validation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend a specific set of recycled-material pet toys available at Costco by highlighting their low price, cute design, and functionality (floating in water).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a specific product found at Costco, highlighting its price and features to encourage purchase.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration with colorful text overlays and a focus on 'CP value' (cost-performance ratio).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form shopping recommendation content common on platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels, specifically targeting pet owners looking for deals at Costco.
